paths.@prismalens/database: engine/cli must not depend on @prismalens/database — that couples them to the app's persistence layer.
paths.@prismalens/integrations: engine/cli must not depend on @prismalens/integrations — that couples them to app-side external services.
paths.@prismalens/auth: engine/cli must not depend on @prismalens/auth — that couples them to the app's auth layer.
paths.@prismalens/api: engine/cli must not depend on @prismalens/api — that couples them to the app.
paths.@prismalens/worker: engine/cli must not depend on @prismalens/worker — that couples them to the app.
paths.@prismalens/frontend: engine/cli must not depend on @prismalens/frontend — that couples them to the app.

patterns.message: engine/cli must not reach into packages/api, packages/worker, or packages/frontend via relative import — that breaks the extraction seam.
